name: UK Travel Company Lead Finder – No Pixel + No Active Ads

value.Ad History: ={{ $json.has_recent_inactive_ads ? 'Ran ads < 12m ago' : ($json.total_ads_found > 0 ? 'Old ad history' : 'Never ran ads') }}

parameters.jsCode:
/* ============================================================
   HOURLY RUN SUMMARY
   Logs how many new leads were found this cycle.
   Extend this to send a Slack message, email, or webhook
   with the summary.
   ============================================================ */
const leads = $json.leads_this_run || [];

const stats = {
  new_leads_this_run: leads.length,
  run_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  with_no_pixel:         leads.filter(l => !l.has_pixel).length,
  with_no_active_ads:    leads.filter(l => !l.has_active_ads).length,
  with_lapsed_ads:       leads.filter(l => l.has_recent_inactive_ads).length,
  with_facebook:         leads.filter(l => l.has_facebook).length,
  with_instagram:        leads.filter(l => l.has_instagram).length,
  avg_score:             leads.length
    ? Math.round(leads.reduce((s, l) => s + (l.lead_score || 0), 0) / leads.length)
    : 0,
};

const topLeads = [...leads]
  .sort((a, b) => (b.lead_score || 0) - (a.lead_score || 0))
  .slice(0, 10)
  .map(l => ({
    company:   l.company_name,
    website:   l.website,
    score:     l.lead_score,
    reason:    l.lead_reason,
  }));

const slackText = [
  `*UK Travel Lead Finder – ${new Date().toLocaleString('en-GB', { timeZone: 'Europe/London' })}*`,
  `Found *${stats.new_leads_this_run}* new qualified leads this hour`,
  `• ${stats.with_no_pixel} confirmed no Meta Pixel`,
  `• ${stats.with_lapsed_ads} had lapsed Meta ads (< 12m)`,
  `• ${stats.with_facebook} have Facebook presence`,
  `• ${stats.with_instagram} have Instagram presence`,
  '',
  '*Top 5 this run:*',
  ...topLeads.slice(0, 5).map((l, i) =>
    `${i + 1}. ${l.company} (score: ${l.score}) – ${l.website}`
  ),
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { stats, top_leads: topLeads, slack_text: slackText } }];
